briefdescription.para: This function clears XMMIDP_GENERAL_INT0 HPD_EVENT bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables XMMIDP_GENERAL_INTERRUPT_0 bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to enable

briefdescription.para: This function enables XMMIDP_HPD_INTERRUPT_ENABLE bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to enable

briefdescription.para: This function disables XMMIDP_GENERAL_INTERRUPT_0 bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to disable

briefdescription.para: This function disables XMMIDP_HPD_INTERRUPT_ENABLE bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to disable

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for when a hpd irq event interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for when a hpd hotplug interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for when a hpd hot unplug interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is the HPD Event interrupt handler for the XMmiDp driver.

detaileddescription.para: When an interrupt happens, it first detects what kind of interrupt happened, then decides which callback function to invoke.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the top-level general interrupt handler for the XMmiDp driver.

detaileddescription.para: It reads the GENERAL_INTERRUPT register, dispatches HPD events to XMmiDp_HpdInterruptHandler, and clears all pending event bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDP_STATUS_ENABLE bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to enable
